about.title: About
about.description: Automation Engineer with 5+ years designing intelligent automation systems for B2B companies across Latin America. Specialized in AI agent architecture, advanced n8n workflows, and LLM integration (Claude, Gemini, GPT-4). Delivered 15+ production-grade projects spanning conversational sales bots, multi-client SEO engines, autonomous prospecting pipelines, and LinkedIn social selling systems.
